objective.title: OBJECTIVE
objective.description: Program your fighter with IF-THEN rules (Battle Protocols) to defeat waves of enemies. Each victory unlocks new triggers and actions to build more powerful strategies.

protocols.title: BATTLE PROTOCOLS
protocols.description: Click PROGRAM to create IF-THEN rules:
protocols.ifTrigger: IF (Trigger) - Condition to check (e.g., "Same Row as Enemy")

combat.title: COMBAT
combat.description: Fighters execute on a 6×3 grid (3×3 per side):
combat.noCross: Fighters can't cross to enemy territory
combat.battleEnds: Battle ends when one fighter reaches 0 HP

progression.title: PROGRESSION
progression.description: Win battles to unlock new triggers and actions. Lose and you restart from scratch. Build the ultimate AI to survive as long as possible!

metaShop.title: PROTOCOL VAULT

empty.statsAffordable: No affordable stat upgrades. Complete more runs to earn Cipher Fragments!
empty.statsPurchased: You haven't purchased any stat upgrades yet.
empty.actionsAffordable: No affordable action unlocks. Keep playing to earn more Cipher Fragments!
empty.actionsPurchased: You haven't unlocked any actions yet.
empty.triggersAffordable: No affordable trigger unlocks right now.
empty.triggersPurchased: You haven't unlocked any triggers yet.
empty.upgradesPurchased: You haven't upgraded any actions yet.

descriptions.statsHint: Permanent stat boosts that apply to all runs. Affordable items shown first.
descriptions.actionsHint: Unlock new actions to use in your protocols. Affordable items shown first.
descriptions.triggersHint: Unlock new triggers for your protocols. Affordable items shown first.
descriptions.upgradesHint: Enhance specific actions to make them more powerful. Affordable items shown first.

metaShop.footer: Earn CF from defeated nodes • Protocol upgrades are permanent
